ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., go/no-go, attention) */,
  "design" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment design */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions provided to participants */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution conducting the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the experiment has ethics approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus presentation */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the stimulus presentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was last updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file containing the stimulus */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .png, .wav) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON column for additional metadata about the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the participant (e.g., healthy, diagnosed with a condition) */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus presented during the trial */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the participant */,
  "response_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the participant's response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session in which the trial occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text field for any additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., button press, vocal response) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant's response (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional data related to the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus presentation */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus presented */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the stimulus presentation */,
  "stop_time" REAL /* Stop time of the stimulus presentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus presentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus presentation was last updated */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial during which the stimulus was presented */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional data related to the stimulus presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_presentations_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_presentations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column for user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the design belongs to */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version associated with the design */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional data related to the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_designs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_designs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Text field for a changelog describing changes made in this version */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional data related to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "session_start_time" REAL /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_stop_time" REAL /* Stop time of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional data related to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
